# Assessment Overview

This directory contains supplemental assessment artifacts generated during project analysis.

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md) - High-level and component-level architecture views.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md) - External dependency categorization and compatibility notes.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md) - API surface and communication contract details.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md) - Persistence model, repositories, and data boundaries.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md) - Runtime/build configuration sources and settings inventory.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md) - Core user-facing workflows and business rules.
